neon-button.name: Neon Button
neon-button.description: A button with a neon glow effect that intensifies on hover.

shimmer-button.name: Shimmer Button
shimmer-button.description: A button with a moving shimmer gradient animation.

magnetic-button.name: Magnetic Button
magnetic-button.description: A button that magnetically follows the cursor on hover.

glass-card.name: Glass Card
glass-card.description: A frosted glass card with backdrop blur and subtle border.

tilt-card.name: Tilt Card
tilt-card.description: A card with a 3D tilt effect that follows the mouse.
